import { VERSION_STRING } from './config/version.js'; if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) { window.addEventListener('load', async () => { const serviceWorkerUrl = new URL('./service-worker.js', window.location.href); serviceWorkerUrl.searchParams.set('v', VERSION_STRING); // Unregister any stale service workers (e.g., old sw.js registered at root scope) try { const registrations = await navigator.serviceWorker.getRegistrations(); for (const reg of registrations) { const scriptURL = reg.active?.scriptURL || reg.installing?.scriptURL || reg.waiting?.scriptURL || ''; const scriptPathname = scriptURL ? new URL(scriptURL).pathname : ''; if (scriptURL && !scriptPathname.endsWith('/service-worker.js')) { await reg.unregister(); } } } catch (_) { /* ignore cleanup errors */ } // Silently check if service-worker.js exists without logging errors fetch(serviceWorkerUrl, { method: 'HEAD', cache: 'no-store' }) .then(response => { if (response.ok) { return navigator.serviceWorker.register(serviceWorkerUrl, { updateViaCache: 'none', }); } // File doesn't exist - silently skip (development mode) return null; }) .then(registration => { if (!registration) return; // Check for updates registration.addEventListener('updatefound', () => { const newWorker = registration.installing; if (!newWorker) return; newWorker.addEventListener('statechange', () => { if (newWorker.state === 'installed' && navigator.serviceWorker.controller) { // New version available - show toast instead of blocking confirm dialog if (window.toast) { window.toast.info('Nova versão disponível!', 0, () => { newWorker.postMessage({ type: 'SKIP_WAITING' }); window.location.reload(); }); } else if (confirm('Nova versão disponível! Recarregar a página?')) { newWorker.postMessage({ type: 'SKIP_WAITING' }); window.location.reload(); } } }); }); }) .catch(() => { // Silently ignore - development mode without service worker }); }); }
